content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit imported and `HMHomeManager()` instantiated in App/WallpaperGridView.swift:2,5, but the app is a wallpaper browser with no home-automation UI or metadata mention (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt).
Pierre: Apple restricts HomeKit to apps with genuine home-automation functionality, and an unexplained HomeKit dependency in a wallpaper app may trigger review questions about data misuse. I found `import HomeKit` and an `HMHomeManager` instance that is never used by any visible feature. Remove the HomeKit import and manager, or add and document a real home-automation feature before submission.
